modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: TVs in SCSC concourse showing color bars instead of content.

full_description_text:  
Hey, so I was at the Sanford Coyote Sports Center and noticed that the concourse TVs are just showing color bars or sometimes a black screen. It’s weird because the menus aren’t updating in Reach either, and I can’t see anything from the Show Control computer on the screens. It’s like they’re stuck or something, and it’s really confusing for everyone trying to check out the latest info.
short_description: TVs in SCSC concourse showing color bars instead of content.
description: Hey, so I was at the Sanford Coyote Sports Center and noticed that the concourse TVs are just showing color bars or sometimes a black screen. It’s weird because the menus aren’t updating in Reach either, and I can’t see anything from the Show Control computer on the screens. It’s like they’re stuck or something, and it’s really confusing for everyone trying to check out the latest info.
